creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=vi&sektion=1&manpath=freebsd-release#SEE_ALSO> includes a non-working link to: 

https://docs.freebsd.org/44doc/usd/13.viref/paper.pdf.

Maybe working around by using angle brackets, 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/44doc/usd/13.viref/paper.pdf>.

Reported by /u/mirror176 at <https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/15g1siq/-/juor77j/>.
